name: 1981 World Championship Butterfield Stageline Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 can (7 oz) whole green chiles, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the onions and beef brisket in oil.
2. Stir in minced garlic, ground pork, green chiles, cumin, oregano, salt, dry mustard, tomato sauce, chopped tomatoes, tequila, beer, chili powder, and beef bouillon cubes.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 2-3 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Do not stir during the last 30 minutes before serving.
6. Serves 25
